steps.title: Follow the shift to NEC
steps.content: The text opens with Samuel Carter's play Eden being produced by the Negro Ensemble Company. It then shifts to the company itself: its founders, its mission, and its role as a forum for Black playwrights.

steps.title: Reject claims not in the history
steps.content: Choice A mentions obstacles the text never discusses. Choice B says the two plays are compared, but they are not. Choice D claims the text summarizes the impact of two plays, and A Raisin in the Sun was not produced by NEC. The answer is C.
